comment_text:
Acme Robotics | Senior Backend Engineer | Berlin, Germany | Hybrid (3 days/week in-office) | €90,000 - €120,000 + equity

We build coffee-fetching robots for tech offices. Backend stack is Python, FastAPI, Postgres, Redis, deployed on AWS via Terraform. ~25 person team, profitable, founder-led.

Apply: jobs@acmerobotics.example or hn@acmerobotics.example.
